assertions.title: RoutineDetail page uses design system colors

steps.action: Navigate to the seeded routine detail route /WEA/routines/2175d9e8-0fa6-4cfd-a0ed-485a3e337525
steps.expected: Routine detail page renders for a real routine record
steps.observed: The page loaded successfully with title "Validation Routine · Routines · Papierklammer".

steps.action: Audit rendered classes within the main content area
steps.expected: No hardcoded emerald/blue/amber/yellow/green/red or shadow utility classes remain
steps.observed: A live DOM audit of the main content found 0 matching hardcoded color/shadow classes; the page rendered with design-system tokens and no visible shadows.

evidence.network: Routine detail route loaded successfully in the local browser.

frictions.description: The first Cluster 1 browser run targeted a non-existent /api/routines/new flow because the company had no routines.
frictions.resolution: Seeded a real routine via POST /api/companies/:companyId/routines and revalidated the actual /WEA/routines/:routineId page.

summary: Revalidated VAL-GUI-EXP-C1-002 after seeding a routine: pass.
